---
title: "Lab 3 - Cloud Prediction"
author: "Insert Name Here"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show Code"
    code-tools: true
    theme: sandstone
    lightbox: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: python3
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python setup}
import sys
sys.path.append("..")

from os.path import join as oj

DATA_PATH = oj("..", "data")
```

# Exploratory Data Analysis

# Prediction Modeling
